description: A wholesale business needs to validate and manage sales tax exemption certificates from its reseller customers.

nodes.task_description: Receive a new exemption certificate from a customer.
Validate the certificate to ensure it is correctly filled out and not expired.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the certificate is valid.

nodes.task_description: Update the customer's account in the billing system to mark them as tax-exempt.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the customer's profile to prevent sales tax from being charged.
